scene.message: Maki's Mother: Maki...{nl} Is that you, Maki?!{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: Waaaaaaaaah!! Mama!!{waitkey}{ret}
Maki's Mother: I'm sorry,{nl} Maki. I'm so sorry...{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: Mama!! Mama!!{nl} Waaaaaaaaaaaaah!!{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: You calmed down?{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: ...mm-hm.{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: I can't...{nl} There's nothing I can do.{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: Why not?
You're the same Sonomura,{nl} aren't you?{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: There's still{nl} ANOTHER Sonomura?!{waitkey}
{ret}
Reiji: ...{wait_fr:60}{nl} This Pandora -
where is it?{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: What?!{nl} Where is this Pandora?!{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: What?!{nl} Where is this Pandora?!{waitkey}{ret}
Brown: What?!{nl} Where is this Pandora?!
{ret}
Ayase: Wait, seriously?!{nl} Where is this thing?!{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: Healthy... you mean{nl} the ideal Sonomura?{waitkey}
The three compacts are the{nl} ones we have, right?
{ret}
Elly: {ctl07:1},
you had two of them,{nl} didn't you? Red & Green...{waitkey}
we're one short.{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: {ctl07:1}, didn't you{nl} have two? Red and Green...{waitkey}We're one short.{waitkey}{ret}
{ret}
Maki: First, please save{nl} the healthy me...
The bad one is me...{waitkey}{clearbox}The healthy me is crying{nl} deep in this forest...{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: I'm sorry... for{nl} everything, I...{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: No, it's okay now.
Maki: Araya's Rock Cave?{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: It's behind the shrine.{waitkey}{ret}
Maki's Mother: I'll come{nl} too...{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: Mama,{nl} wait here, please.
{ret}
Maki's Mother: Why?{nl} Why not, Maki?!{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: Take care of Mama{nl} for me, okay?{waitkey}{ret}
Then the door will open.
{ret}
Nanjo: Shall we go, then?{nl} To Araya Shrine.{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: Further in, huh...{nl} Let's hurry, {ctl0f:1}.{waitkey}{ret}
